label: Regression losses (MSE, MAE, robust)

node.label: Regression losses (MSE, MAE, robust)
node.definition: Continuous predictions are trained by penalizing distance from numerical targets.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Regression losses (MSE, MAE, robust) is to connect Supervised learning, Statistics & experimental design to downstream capabilities including Linear models & generalized linear models, Decision trees, random forests & boosted trees.
examples: substrate for Linear models & generalized linear models
substrate for Decision trees, random forests & boosted trees
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Statistics & experimental design.

dependencies.rationale: Regression losses (MSE, MAE, robust) uses Supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Regression losses (MSE, MAE, robust) uses Statistics & experimental design as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Regression losses (MSE, MAE, robust) uses Calculus & automatic differentiation theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Continuous predictions are trained by penalizing distance from numerical targets.

The role of Regression losses (MSE, MAE, robust) is to connect Supervised learning, Statistics & experimental design to downstream capabilities including Linear models & generalized linear models, Decision trees, random forests & boosted trees.
